_comment: List the MCP servers your organization has approved for use with OpenCode. Remove this comment field and fill in real entries before rollout.

mcpServers.label: Internal Docs
mcpServers.purpose: Query internal documentation and knowledge base
mcpServers.notes: Replace this with your actual approved MCP server configuration

_instructions: For each approved MCP server, add an entry with: id (unique identifier), label (display name), status ('approved' when real), access ('read-only' or 'read-write'), purpose (what it does), approvedBy (who approved it), and notes (any usage restrictions). Remove any entries that are not actually approved for use.
